subject: Ops note: symposium deployment schedule for Madrid | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-7485
body: Intelligence from Madrid indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the symposium banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart. Reference initiative INIT-7485. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
